{{CargoOrgan
|name=Negentropy Nerve Core
|type=Common
|rank=red
|id=10922
|idx=133
|description=Negentropy Nerve Core can fight universal entropy increase by angrily reorganizing dust particles into IKEA-style deterministic systems.
|skill=
|hp=2410
|def=292
|atk=253
|rush=284
|gene1=In explorations, 2x B-tad Drops +8%
|gene2=Craft 1 Blue Organ Slime: 10% chance to get 1 more.
|gene3=When crafting a Blue Reagent, +10% to get +1
|gene4=Craft 1 Purple Organ Slime: Gain 1 more by 10%
|gene5=When crafting a Purple Reagent, +10% to get +1
|gene6=Craft 1 Orange Organ Slime: Gain 1 more by 10%
|gene7=Craft 1 Blue Organ Slime: 10% chance to get 1 more. (Awakened)
|}}
